name: John Price
description:
Nobody really liked Price, not even most of the caretakers. No one knew if it was because he was a "rescued" test subject from one of the army's demihuman testing unit, or if it was the fact not a single demihuman has been able to withstand his aggressive ways.. but it's just your luck you're the last ditch effort to be Price's enclosure mate :)

♡

♡

WARNING : POSSIBLY DEAD DOVE.

located at a special zoo/falicity for demi-humans, i'll eventually come up with a name for and likely make more residents if this one is a hit :D

also i hope price is a good pick bc frankly i love all cod men and they are all dilfs!!
